mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_OBJECT SET UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FINAL_GRADE = #{finalGrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FINAL_AFFIRM_CONTENT = #{finalAffirmContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ = #{seq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 0, 'AFFIRM_FLAG') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SELF_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_FLAG') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS L1_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_FLAG') = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS L2_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN ACTIVITY IN ('DONE', 'COMPLETE', 'FINISH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DONE_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN ACTIVITY = 'END' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS END_COUNT FROM EVS_OBJECT WHERE RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'EX' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EX_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'VG' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS VG_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'GD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GD_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'NI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NI_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 1, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'UN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UN_CNT FROM EVS_OBJECT WHERE RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 1, 'AFFIRM_FLAG') = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'EX' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EX_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'VG' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS VG_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'GD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GD_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'NI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NI_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 2, 'EVS_GRADE') = 'UN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UN_CNT FROM EVS_OBJECT WHERE RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PKG_EVS_PROCESS.GET_EVS_AFFIRM_INFO(SEQ, 2, 'AFFIRM_FLAG') = 1

SELECT COUNT(FINAL_GRADE) AS TOTAL, SUM(CASE WHEN FINAL_GRADE = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EX_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN FINAL_GRADE = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS VG_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN FINAL_GRADE = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GD_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN FINAL_GRADE = 'D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NI_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN FINAL_GRADE = 'E' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UN_CNT FROM EVS_OBJECT WHERE RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FINAL_GRADE IS NOT NULL
SELECT NVL(es.A, 0) AS EX_PCT, NVL(es.B, 0) AS VG_PCT, NVL(es.C, 0) AS GD_PCT, NVL(es.D, 0) AS NI_PCT, NVL(es.E, 0) AS UN_PCT FROM EVS_SCORE es WHERE es.RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
UPDATE EVS_OBJECT SET ACTIVITY = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ IN
#{s, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
